comment: Example assessor configuration. Three independent diverse-jurisdiction providers, each accessed via a documented HTTP API. Replace the example provider names + model identifiers with your own substrate-substitutable choices. The pattern requires three; the names are not load-bearing.

assessors.rationale: European substrate; commercial-API access; strong on European-languages and regulatory-style assessment.
Canadian substrate; enterprise-retrieval-strong; calibration-stable across long evaluation windows.
Open-weights model on Western inference infra; auditable weights; substrate-diverse from the two commercial APIs.

rotation_rule.comment: If one assessor is also asked to shape the prompt or generate the output, that assessor is excluded from the assessment. Assessment then runs 2-of-2 on the remaining; an operator-review flag is raised at certification.

blocked_providers.comment: Providers explicitly excluded from the quality pipeline. The exclusion reasons are operator-set; substitutable per organisation policy.
blocked_providers.rationale: Operator-set jurisdictional posture: no US providers in quality pipeline; Chinese open-weights permitted on Western infra only.
